title: ericameria parryi var. howardii
intro: Ericameria parryi var. howardii, also known as Howard's goldenbush, is a shrubby perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it has been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Howard's goldenbush can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
